shell.subtitle: Frictionless Marketing Operations
shell.showroomLine: Premium cockpit preview. Metrics are illustrative for Madmonos Lux Cosmetics.

disconnected.description: Your ad API tokens may need refresh or data may not have synced yet. Refresh the connection to restore daily metrics.
disconnected.zeroAccountsDescription: Connect one or more paid channels (Meta, Google Ads, TikTok). Metrics and charts populate automatically after the first sync — you do not need every channel.

Performance.syncPendingBanner: Accounts connected — pulling the last 30 days from each API. Metrics usually appear within a minute; refresh if numbers stay at zero.

toolbarHint.srFilters: Time range and channel scope filters

monoReport.sr: Download executive mono Report as PDF

executiveTrend.title: Executive trend
executiveTrend.subtitle: Paid media · spend vs attributed revenue · SSOT

seoMatrix.sectionSubtitle: Organic visibility from Google Search Console and on-site experience signals — descriptive metrics only. No campaign recommendations.
seoMatrix.empty: Connect Google and complete a GSC sync to populate this matrix.
seoMatrix.emptyConnected: Your Google link is live. We are ingesting Search Console query rows — the matrix will fill as soon as the first snapshot lands.
seoMatrix.indexingFootnote: URL-level indexing exports are not wired yet — this cell stays in premium standby until the feed connects.
seoMatrix.cwvFootnote: Core Web Vitals hydrate from our PageSpeed-style telemetry — first paint arrives shortly after workspace activity.
seoMatrix.cwvSubWhenMissing: CLS and FID appear with the same snapshot as LCP.
seoMatrix.impressionsHint: How many times you appeared on Google results surfaces.
seoMatrix.nonBrandHint: Visibility driven by service-intent queries — excluding your brand name tokens.
seoMatrix.positionHint: Weighted average rank where Google placed your listings for these queries.
seoMatrix.clicksHint: Net visits from Google search to your site for this snapshot.
seoMatrix.ctrHint: Of everyone who saw you, what share clicked through.
seoMatrix.indexingHint: URLs Google could not crawl or index — requires Search Console indexing export (not wired yet).
seoMatrix.cwvHint: Core Web Vitals snapshot — how quickly key pages become usable on mobile.

comparison.title: Platform comparison
comparison.subtitle: Paid channels · ROAS, CPA and spend side-by-side

blueprint.spendCurveCaption: Channel spend appears here after connection.
blueprint.clickEfficiencyCaption: CTR and conversion cards fill automatically.

recentActivity.title: Activity feed
recentActivity.emptyHint: Actions across Creative Studio, Performance and Strategy will appear here

performancePage.connectedBanner: {platform} connected · syncing last 30 days of data in the background

campaignTable.title: Active campaigns
campaignTable.subtitle: All platforms · real-time sync
campaignTable.emptySubtitle: Campaigns synced from connected ad accounts will appear here

spendChart.title: Ad spend trend
spendChart.emptyHint: The spend curve renders after ad accounts connect and daily sync completes.
spendChart.noSpendInRange: No paid spend recorded in this window yet. If you just connected, wait for sync; otherwise check campaign dates or currency.

connectedAccounts.title: Connected ad accounts · SSOT
connectedAccounts.disconnectDescription: No active ad account found. OAuth with Meta, Google, or TikTok to start data flow.

PremiumMessages.sessionRequired: Your session paused this action. Sign in again or refresh the page, then retry.
PremiumMessages.invalidPayload: The request body could not be read. Refresh and try again with valid JSON.
PremiumMessages.actionError: We're processing this data right now. Please try again in a few minutes. If it persists, contact your team.
PremiumMessages.adminActionError: This action couldn't be completed. Please try again or contact support.
PremiumMessages.integrationReconnectHint: We need to refresh the connection. Re-authorize the platform from Integrations.
PremiumMessages.integrationOauthRefresh: We need to refresh the connection. Re-authorize the relevant platform from Integrations, then try sync again.
PremiumMessages.integrationDecrypt: Secure credentials couldn't be read. Remove and reconnect the account from Integrations. If it persists, contact support.
PremiumMessages.integrationRateLimit: The platform temporarily rate-limited requests. Try sync again in a few minutes.
PremiumMessages.integrationMetaApi: The Meta API didn't respond. Retry sync from Integrations shortly; if it persists, refresh the connection.
PremiumMessages.integrationGoogleAdsApi: Google Ads API didn't return data. Check the connection and try again in a few minutes.
PremiumMessages.integrationTiktokApi: The TikTok API didn't respond. Refresh the connection and retry sync.
PremiumMessages.integrationGsc: Search Console data couldn't be fetched. Check your Google connection and site verification, then retry.
PremiumMessages.integrationNetwork: The network dropped. Check your connection and try again shortly.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: This subdomain or page doesn't exist, or you may not have access.

unauthorized.title: Access denied
unauthorized.description: You don't have permission to access this resource. Contact your admin if you believe this is an error.

errorRoot.title: Something went wrong
errorRoot.description: An unexpected error occurred. Our engineering team has been notified.

errorTenant.title: We couldn't load this section
errorTenant.fallbackDetail: Connection or data source may be unavailable. Try again in a moment.

controlCenter.summary: Today {activeTenants} tenants are active, {recentSyncs24h} new syncs completed, system performance {perfPercent}.
controlCenter.roleCardLead: Role hierarchy & permission matrix — frictionless management.
controlCenter.roleCardSub: New roles, policies, and Brand Mono access layers.

opsCenter.heroSubtitle: Track bottlenecks, approvals, and vault health. Use Browse to impersonate the tenant — frictionless Madmonos control.
opsCenter.emptyStableTitle: All systems stable, Madmonos is secure
opsCenter.emptyStableSubtitle: The task queue is empty. Brand Vault alerts and creative bridges will appear here live.

rolesPage.title: Role Architect
rolesPage.description: Manage global roles and the permission matrix; customize core hierarchy safely with per-tenant overrides. super_admin is locked; management.users stays protected for tenant_admin.

tasks.creativePendingBody: Action needed in Creative Studio for client or team approval.
tasks.creativeRevisionBody: Client requested revisions; review and respond in Creative Studio.
tasks.vaultMissingBodyBoth: brand_assets and brand_knowledge_chunks are empty for this tenant. Populate the vault for GEO and Mono AI.
tasks.vaultMissingBodyAssets: No brand_assets rows — add vault content.
tasks.vaultMissingBodyChunks: brand_knowledge_chunks is empty — check indexing / chunk pipeline.

Creative.modalDescription: This mirrors Ops Calendar → Add Event → Social Post flow.

revisionThread.aspectNotePlaceholder: Clear notes for this heading… (left blank, it won't appear in the revision)
revisionThread.emptySubtitle: Add a note below or approve when ready.
revisionThread.dangerZoneBody: Removes the creative from the database and S3; cannot be undone.
revisionThread.placeholderImageComment: General note (optional) — applies to the whole image; use the headings below for detail.
revisionThread.imageDetailsHint: Pick a heading; each saves separately. Empty fields are omitted and won't appear in the revision.
revisionThread.approveConfirmBody: When approved, this creative is added to the Ops Calendar as a Social Post at the scheduled date/time from upload.
revisionThread.deleteConfirmBody: Removes the database row and the file on S3; revision history is deleted. Cannot be undone.

BrandVault.uploadKindHint: Select company colors for images; otherwise auto-detection defaults to logo.
BrandVault.uploaderLabel: Drop files here or click to browse
BrandVault.uploaderHint: Logo (SVG/PNG), brand book (PDF), fonts — max 50 MB
BrandVault.emptySubtitle: Upload logos, brand books, fonts and color palettes above
BrandVault.primaryLockedBody: Unlock in Mastery at Level 5 to sync this logo across Sidebar, header, and mobile shell.

seoGeo.geoSubtitleFallback: Simulated visibility from DeepSeek GEO engine · refresh via cron or pipeline

dataDisconnected.defaultDescription: Ad account connection could not be refreshed or data has not arrived yet. Reconnect to restart the stream.

fileUploader.defaultLabel: Drop files here or click to upload
fileUploader.defaultHint: Images, videos, PDFs — up to {maxFiles} files

1.title: Your command center
1.body: All platform KPIs in one cockpit — ROAS, Spend, Revenue, CTR. Switch the time range or platform filter to slice any dimension instantly.

2.title: Cross-channel analytics
2.body: Compare Meta, Google, and TikTok side-by-side. The Executive Trend chart shows momentum; Campaign Table shows line-item reality.

3.title: Approval workflow
3.body: Upload creatives, leave revision comments, and mark assets Approved. Approved posts auto-land on the Ops Calendar.

4.title: Level up while you work
4.body: Every action — AI messages, uploads, approvals — earns XP. Reach Level 5 (Brand Architect) to unlock white-label shell branding.
